introSection: Kentucky Rumbler is a wooden roller coaster located at Beech Bend in Bowling Green, Kentucky, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Kentucky Rumbler was announced on July 28, 2005. The park hosted a naming contest for the ride, with the winners receiving season passes and first ridership. The ride opened on May 6, 2006.

Approximately 230 feet of Titan Track was added to the ride in 2023 by Great Coasters International and Skyline Attractions.

fullText:
Kentucky Rumbler is a wooden roller coaster located at Beech Bend in Bowling Green, Kentucky, USA.

Kentucky Rumbler was announced on July 28, 2005. The park hosted a naming contest for the ride, with the winners receiving season passes and first ridership. The ride opened on May 6, 2006.

Approximately 230 feet of Titan Track was added to the ride in 2023 by Great Coasters International and Skyline Attractions.



Millennium Flyer train.
